title: Compressed Output: read_file
summary:
Daily Record 2026-03-20 – key facts

Assistant identity  
- Consistent self-description: “Ganlia, senior software engineer & collaborative peer programmer.”

Project structure  
- Maven project `ganglia-example`, parent `work.ganglia:ganglia-parent:0.1.5`.  
- Dependencies: internal `ganglia-core / coding / web / terminal`, external `vertx-core`, `slf4j-api`, `log4j-slf2-impl`.

Markdown inventory  
- 33–48 `.md` files across tree (counts vary by session).  
- Largest: `.ganglia/logs/2026-03-18.md` ≈ 282 KB.  
- Daily log files span 2026-03-11 to 2026-03-20; 13 skill docs under `.ganglia/skills`.

User requests & outcomes  
- Meaningless input (“sdsd”, “ww”) → assistant asks for clarification.  
- `pom.xml` read and echoed successfully multiple times.  
- Date query: once answered “Friday”, later stated no real-time calendar access.  
- Non-dev requests (dinner ideas, day of week) → declined, scope limited to software-engineering tasks.

Bug-fix workflow  
- Auto-generated 4-item todo list: review/prioritize bugs, reproduce, write tests, implement fixes.  
- User marked “Review bug reports and prioritize…” complete; list otherwise empty.
